candidate_lesson.lesson_text: When internal regime is MOMENTUM but TradingView returns zero confirming signals, treat the 75% sizing multiplier as a hard ceiling AND require the 30-indicator conviction to exceed 55% before entry — internal-only MOMENTUM below that conviction is the weakest configuration in the confirmation stack.
candidate_lesson.mechanism: A MOMENTUM regime call with no external confirmation means only the internal ensemble sees the move; institutionally, durable momentum leaves a footprint across multiple venues/timeframes, so the absence of TV agreement signals the move is being carried by a single crowded flow that reverts once that flow exhausts. Low internal conviction (<55%) on top of that means even the internal ensemble is split — you are sizing into noise dressed as trend.
candidate_lesson.testable_rule: if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0 and consensus_conviction < 0.55: veto_entry() else if internal_regime == 'MOMENTUM' and tv_signal_count == 0: size *= 0.75
candidate_lesson.expected_impact: Filters the lowest-quality MOMENTUM entries (EURUSD conv=8%, GBPUSD/USDJPY conv=50% currently sit below the 55% gate); expected Sharpe +0.02 to +0.03 via variance reduction on unconfirmed regime trades.
candidate_lesson.evidence_from_harvest: External regime block shows Internal=MOMENTUM vs TradingView=UNKNOWN (0 signals), sizing already auto-cut to 75% at 65% confidence; simultaneously EURUSD conv=8%, GBPUSD conv=50%, USDJPY conv=50% all sit below a 55% bar while only AUDUSD (58%, hist_hr=68%) clears it — the system is already flagging these as marginal.
candidate_lesson.reasoning_component_targeted: consensus_conviction (30-indicator) gated jointly with tv_signal_count and internal_regime

retirement_flag.reason: L9 mandates that CONFIRMED hypotheses expire without an implementation commit — with 0 trades over the last 7 days and 11 pending research items, several codified lessons (esp. session/VIX gates) may be running past their validation window with no fresh out-of-sample confirmation.

reflection.system_health_note: Zero trades in 7 days with Regime=UNKNOWN and no closed decision logs means the system is currently starved of fresh evidence — lessons must be harvest/config-derived until the paper-trade counter accumulates enough to unblock RQ-006.
